mxCell.value:
+ validate() : Boolean
+ getFullName() : String
+ updateEmail(newEmail : String) : void

+ updateAccessibilityProfile(profile: AccessibilityProfile) : void

+ addFavouriteRoom(room: Room): void

+ removeFavouriteRoom(room: Room) : void
+ getFavouriteRooms() : List<Room>

+ enableAccessibleRouting() : void

+ disableAccessibleRouting() : void

+ isAccessibleRoutingEnabled(): Boolean

Deuteranopia -> difficulty distinguishing reds and greens

Protanopia -> difficulty distinguishing blue-green, purple-red, yellow-pink

+ addClassTime(ct : ClassTime) : void
+ removeClassTime(ct : ClassTime) : void
+ getClassTimes() : List<ClassTime>

classTimes can be pulled from the Concordia Open Data API.

Room info cannot, as the API no longer provides location info for ongoing/future courses.
duration should represent time in hours preferably

e.g. roomCode: MB S2.255
/floorCode: S2
/buildingCode: MB

- buildingCode: String
- rooms: List<Room>
- pointsOfInterest: List<PointOfInterest>

+ displayRoute(route: Route): void
+ addNode(node : IndoorNode) : void
+ addEdge(edge : IndoorEdge) : void
Locations are selectable for start/end points in a route (when looking for directions)
selectedCalendar is essentially the reference to the User's selected Google Calendar
